name: Grant Proposal
tagline: Formal grant proposal deck with document-like sections, navy and gold hierarchy, budget tables, and evidence-first layouts.

palette.description: Warm document canvas with navy title blocks, gold rules, white paper panels, and muted institutional copy.

typography.style: Formal serif display with neutral sans body for dense proposal copy and tables.

best_for: Grant proposals, foundation pitches, nonprofit funding requests, academic funding applications, and evidence-heavy program proposals.
avoid_for: Playful creative campaigns, lightweight social decks, or expressive brand pitches where formal document structure would feel too rigid.

source_inspiration.name: Presentations.ai Grant Proposal Template
source_inspiration.notes: Independent page-by-page HTML/CSS reconstruction inspired by the public grant proposal template page: document-like structure, business/formal tone, navy and gold hierarchy, tables, logic model, evidence panels, evaluation plan, risk controls, and funding ask. It does not reuse source slide assets.
